data.title: Billionaire Dan Loeb doubles down on AI, increasing stake in Microsoft by 175% to 1.1M shares in Q3 of 2025, while boosting Meta stake by 47%. Microsoft eyes $5 trillion market cap with AI growth, while Meta benefits from data center expansion.
data.description: Dan Loeb's Third Point LLC made significant changes to its portfolio in the third quarter of 2025, particularly with some of the "Magnificent Seven" stocks. One of these stocks was Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ: MSFT), in which Third Point increased its stake by 175% to 1.1 million shares as of Sept. 30, 2025. Microsoft saw strong earnings growth driven by Cloud and AI, beating consensus estimates in the fourth quarter FY25 and first quarter FY26. In October, Microsoft signed a new agreement with OpenAI, resulting in Microsoft holding a stake of around 27% in OpenAI Group PBC valued at $135 billion. Analysts suggest Microsoft could reach a $5 trillion market cap, with FY26 being a significant year for AI growth. However, Microsoft's stock declined by 0.47% in the last year, underperforming the iShares U.S. Technology ETF (NYSE: IYW), and lagging behind its peer Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL), which fell around 5.61% year-to-date. Additionally, Third Point increased its stake in Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: META) by 47% as of Sept. 30, 2025.
Brent Crude futures settle at $64.06/bbl, down $1.18, 1.81%.

data.title: Tom McGrath appointed as SVP, Head of Program Underwriting at MS Transverse, with 37+ years (re)insurance experience.
data.description: A seasoned professional with over 37 years of experience in the (re)insurance industry has joined MS Transverse to enhance their program underwriting capabilities. Based in New York, MS Transverse is a prominent hybrid fronting carrier that collaborates with MGAs and program administrators nationwide. The announcement was made on January 22, 2026.

data.title: Elastic (NYSE: ESTC) releases Agent Builder for building AI agents with advanced capabilities for context-driven tasks.
data.description: In San Francisco, Elastic, listed on the New York Stock Exchange as ESTC, has unveiled the launch of Agent Builder. This comprehensive tool aims to aid developers in efficiently constructing secure, dependable, contextually aware AI agents. To execute complex tasks with precision, AI agents require appropriate context. Powered by Elasticsearch, Agent Builder specializes in context engineering by ensuring relevancy within a scalable, searchable, and analytical enterprise data platform. This release marks a significant advancement in simplifying the process of developing AI agents.

data.title: Zentro teams up with Calix, reduces property issue resolution by 30% with SmartMDU, delivering near-perfect uptime.
data.description: In San Jose, California, Calix, Inc. (NYSE: CALX) shared news about Zentro, a prominent managed service provider focused on multi-dwelling units. Zentro is rapidly rolling out deployments in key urban areas using the acclaimed SmartMDU™ by Calix Broadband Platform. SmartMDU offers a straightforward and adaptable solution that ensures dependable property-wide managed Wi-Fi for multifamily dwellings. This enhances Zentro’s ability to customize resident experiences and boost operational efficiency for property management.

Trump: Today, I am announcing the United States’ intention to bid for the World Expo 2035. The Great State of Florida has expressed strong interest in hosting the Expo in Miami, which I fully support. Miami Expo 2035 can be the next big milestone in our new Golden Age of America.

data.title: Simon Perdue, PLLC promotes Oilfield Safety Week emphasizing preventable dangers faced by workers and legal accountability.
data.description: In honor of Oilfield Safety Week, the trial lawyers at Simon Perdue, PLLC in Houston are shedding light on the persistent and avoidable risks encountered by oilfield workers. Emphasizing the pivotal importance of legal responsibility, they highlight the crucial role it plays in ensuring safety.

data.title: Gold Coast Health Plan in Ventura County earns NCQA Plan Accreditation, improving member experience.
data.description: In Camarillo, California, on January 22, 2026, Gold Coast Health Plan (GCHP) reaffirmed its commitment to improving quality, accessibility, and member satisfaction for Ventura County residents. GCHP proudly shared that it has achieved Health Plan Accreditation from the National Committee for Quality, signifying its dedication to meeting rigorous standards. This accreditation underscores GCHP's ongoing efforts to enhance healthcare delivery in the region.

data.title: Major winter storm may disrupt travel plans with ice, sleet, and substantial snow expected in the eastern U.S. from Friday.
data.description: Severe winter weather including ice, sleet, and potential heavy snowfall is expected to disrupt air travel across the eastern United States beginning this Friday. Travelers should be prepared for possible delays and cancellations as a result of these weather conditions.

data.title: Visa partners with Mercuryo to offer crypto-to-fiat conversion for eligible users via Visa Direct, expanding global payment reach.
data.description: On Thursday, Visa Inc. (NYSE: V) announced a partnership with the global payments platform Mercuryo to provide fast and smooth crypto-to-fiat off-ramps via Visa Direct. This collaboration enables Mercuryo's eligible users to convert digital assets into fiat currency on their Visa debit or credit cards quickly and cost-effectively. Visa Direct facilitates swift money transfers across brokerage, crypto, and digital banking accounts, enhancing the accessibility of secure, real-time payments worldwide.
